debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
this : 0 ∉ uIcc a b
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b

failed_attempts:
apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt
  · intros x hx
    have hx' := ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
    convert (Real.hasDerivAt_log hx').sub (hasDerivAt_inv hx') using 1
    field_simp [hx']; ring
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.add
    · exact continuousOn_id.inv (fun x hx => ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this)
    · exact (continuousOn_id.pow 2).inv (fun x hx => pow_ne_zero 2 (ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this))

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun x ↦ log x - 1 / x)]
  · ring
  · intro x hx
    have hx' := ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
    rw [sub_eq_add_neg]
    apply HasDerivAt.add
    · exact hasDerivAt_log hx'
    · convert (hasDerivAt_inv hx').neg using 1; simp
  · apply ContinuousOn.add
    · apply continuousOn_id.inv
      intro x hx; exact ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
    · apply (continuousOn_id.pow 2).inv
      intro x hx; exact pow_ne_zero _ (ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this)

apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun x => log x - 1 / x)
  · intro x hx
    have hx0 := ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
    rw [one_div, one_div, one_div, sub_eq_add_neg]
    apply HasDerivAt.add
    · exact hasDerivAt_log hx0
    · convert (hasDerivAt_inv hx0).neg using 1
      field_simp [hx0]; ring
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.add
    · exact continuousOn_inv₀.mono (subset_compl_singleton_iff.mpr this)
    · apply continuousOn_const.div (continuousOn_id.pow 2)
      intro x hx; exact pow_ne_zero 2 (ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this)
  · ring

have h_ne : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], x ≠ 0 := fun x hx ↦ ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
  rw [integral_add]
  · rw [integral_inv this]
    rw [(rfl : ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = ∫ x in a..b, x ^ (-2 : ℤ))]
    rw [integral_zpow (by decide) this]
    norm_num
    rw [abs_of_pos ha, abs_of_pos hb]
    ring
  · apply ContinuousOn.integrableOn_uIcc
    exact continuousOn_inv.mono h_ne
  · apply ContinuousOn.integrableOn_uIcc
    exact (continuousOn_inv.pow 2).mono h_ne

rw [show log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b = (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) by ring]
  apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun x ↦ log x - 1 / x)
  · intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this

    · simp only [one_div]; apply ContinuousOn.pow
      apply ContinuousOn.inv continuousOn_id
      exact fun x hx ↦ ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this

    have : ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = 1 / a - 1 / b := by
      convert integral_rpow_of_ne_one (s := -2) (by norm_num) this using 1

  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuousOn_inv₀.mono (subset_compl_singleton_iff.mpr this)
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const (continuous_pow 2).continuousOn
    intro x hx h0
    exact ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this (pow_eq_zero h0)

  · intro x hx
